title: Santorini Dreamscape
description: Lose yourself in the whitewashed charm of Santorini. From breathtaking caldera sunsets to hidden volcanic beaches, this curated journey blends luxury stays with authentic Greek island life.

itinerary.title: Oia
itinerary.description: Arrive and settle into your cliffside villa. Explore the iconic blue-domed churches and narrow pathways of Oia.

itinerary.title: Fira & Imerovigli
itinerary.description: Hike the caldera trail from Fira to Imerovigli. Visit the prehistoric site of Akrotiri.

itinerary.title: Red Beach & Wine Country
itinerary.description: Visit the famous Red Beach and tour the island's finest wineries. Enjoy a private sunset sailing cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Leisurely morning and transfer to the airport with unforgettable memories.

title: Japan: Land of the Rising Sun
description: A carefully crafted journey through Japan's most iconic cities. From Tokyo's electric energy to Kyoto's serene temples and Osaka's legendary street food scene.

itinerary.title: Tokyo
itinerary.description: Explore Shibuya, Akihabara, and Senso-ji temple. Experience the world's best sushi at Tsukiji.

itinerary.title: Kyoto
itinerary.description: Visit Fushimi Inari, Kinkaku-ji, and the bamboo groves. Participate in a traditional tea ceremony.

itinerary.title: Osaka
itinerary.description: Dive into Dotonbori's street food. Visit Osaka Castle and the vibrant Shinsekai district.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning in Osaka before your homeward journey.

title: Bali Wellness Retreat
description: Rejuvenate your mind and body in the spiritual heart of Bali. A holistic journey through emerald rice terraces, ancient temples, and world-class wellness retreats.

itinerary.title: Ubud
itinerary.description: Settle into your jungle retreat. Morning yoga, afternoon rice terrace walks, and evening meditation.

itinerary.title: Mount Batur & Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Pre-dawn hike to Mount Batur for sunrise. Visit sacred water temples and hidden waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Seminyak
itinerary.description: Beach relaxation, surf lessons, and farewell dinner at a cliffside restaurant.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final sunrise meditation before heading home renewed.

title: Swiss Alpine Adventure
description: Conquer the Swiss Alps with this adventure-packed journey. From paragliding over Lake Brienz to hiking trails with Matterhorn views.

itinerary.title: Interlaken
itinerary.description: Arrive in the adventure capital. Paraglide over turquoise lakes and hike to stunning viewpoints.

itinerary.title: Jungfraujoch
itinerary.description: Train to the highest railway station in Europe. Walk on the Aletsch Glacier.

itinerary.title: Zermatt
itinerary.description: Scenic Glacier Express journey. Hike the 5-Lakes Trail with Matterhorn views.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Scenic departure through the Swiss countryside.

title: Maldives Paradise
description: The ultimate luxury escape. Overwater villas, private beaches, and crystal-clear waters in one of the world's most exclusive destinations.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Seaplane transfer to your overwater villa. Welcome champagne and sunset viewing.

itinerary.title: Ocean Adventures
itinerary.description: Morning snorkeling at the house reef. Afternoon dolphin cruise.

itinerary.title: Wellness & Relaxation
itinerary.description: Sunrise yoga on the water. Couples spa journey. Underwater restaurant dinner.

itinerary.title: Island Hopping
itinerary.description: Visit local islands, enjoy a private beach picnic, and depart.

title: Peru: Inca Trail Expedition
description: Walk in the footsteps of the Incas on this epic trek to Machu Picchu. A blend of adventure, history, and Andean culture.

itinerary.title: Cusco
itinerary.description: Acclimatize at altitude. Explore colonial Cusco, San Pedro market, and Sacsayhuaman ruins.

itinerary.title: Sacred Valley
itinerary.description: Visit Ollantaytambo, Moray terraces, and Maras salt mines.

itinerary.title: Inca Trail
itinerary.description: Trek through cloud forests and ancient passes. Arrive at the Sun Gate for your first view of Machu Picchu.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Train back to Cusco and farewell dinner.

title: Iceland: Fire & Ice
description: Chase the Northern Lights and explore volcanic landscapes. From geysers to glaciers, Iceland is nature at its most dramatic.

itinerary.title: Reykjavik
itinerary.description: Explore the colorful capital. Visit Hallgrimskirkja and enjoy the Blue Lagoon.

itinerary.title: Golden Circle & South Coast
itinerary.description: Gullfoss waterfall, Geysir, and the black sand beaches of Vik.

itinerary.title: Jökulsárlón & Glacier
itinerary.description: Glacier lagoon boat tour. Ice cave exploration and Northern Lights chase.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final soak in a natural hot spring before heading home.

title: Sahara Desert Odyssey
description: An immersive desert journey from the bustling souks of Marrakech to the silent dunes of the Sahara. Camp under the stars and ride camels at sunrise.

itinerary.title: Marrakech
itinerary.description: Explore Jemaa el-Fnaa, the souks, and Majorelle Garden. Cooking class in a traditional riad.

itinerary.title: Atlas Mountains
itinerary.description: Drive through the dramatic Tizi n'Tichka pass and the stunning Dades Gorge.

itinerary.title: Sahara Desert
itinerary.description: Camel trek into the Erg Chebbi dunes. Sleep under the stars at a luxury desert camp.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Sunrise over the dunes before the journey back to Marrakech.
